title: Determine the exact value of R(B7, B7)
lean_gate_reason: Lean is not the shortest path to a sealed publication packet because the exact value R(B7, B7) = 30 is already directly implied in prior art. Formalization here would only archive a rediscovery.
micro_paper_assessment: Fails the active micro-paper lane. The Paley(29) witness is correct, but the exact value is already directly implied by prior art, so there is no frontier publication packet to seal.
family_affinity: Strong diagonal-book Ramsey affinity via a Paley / conference extremal witness on 29 vertices.
generalization_signal: Strong lower-bound family signal: Paley orders q = 4t + 1 suggest reusable witnesses for B_t.
strongest_honest_claim: The Paley(29) construction correctly rederives the lower bound R(B7, B7) >= 30, but the exact value R(B7, B7) = 30 is already directly implied by published prior art.
candidate_theorem_slice: Paley(29) yields a B7-free 2-coloring of K29, giving the known lower bound R(B7, B7) >= 30; together with the published upper bound <= 30, this exact instance is a rediscovery.
